leadershipSection.title: More than motion execution: production leadership from brief to final delivery.
leadershipSection.description: I help teams turn complex learning briefs into structured production plans, align the creative workflow, guide designers and animators, manage quality, and deliver stakeholder-ready video systems.

strengths.title: Team Leadership
strengths.description: Led and coordinated a 10+ person creative team across design, animation, motion, audio, and delivery tasks.

strengths.title: Project Planning
strengths.description: Converted briefs into story, storyboard, production milestones, review points, and delivery-ready execution plans.

strengths.title: Pipeline Ownership
strengths.description: Built repeatable workflows for Gen AI visuals, motion graphics, audio prep, SFX, final edit, QA, and handoff.

strengths.title: Stakeholder Delivery
strengths.description: Managed feedback loops, quality checks, consistency standards, and final output so teams could ship reliably.

experiences.title: Sr. Motion Graphics Designer - Team Lead
highlights: Led a cross-functional team of 10 designers and animators
Built end-to-end workflow pipelines reducing production time by 40-50%
Designed motion graphics for SaaS and enterprise clients
Integrated Gen AI workflows into team production pipelines

experiences.title: Motion Graphics Lead - Head of Production
highlights: Led motion design for YouTube network with 2.6M+ subscribers
Delivered 300+ explainer videos with 65%+ viewer retention
Built internal motion pipelines and animation libraries

experiences.title: Associate Process Manager - AR Motion
highlights: Managed AR product animation pipeline from CAD to visualization
Handled global brand clients across broadcast and digital

experiences.title: Motion Graphics Designer
highlights: Designed animated sequences and UI elements for LMS modules

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.title: AI E-Learning Production Leadership
caseStudy.description: 30+ production-grade modules and intro assets led through story, storyboard, Gen AI workflow, motion graphics, SFX, QA, and delivery.

hero.body: I help employers and creative teams turn complex learning briefs into structured video systems. 6+ years of motion leadership, 10+ person team leadership, 300+ videos produced, and end-to-end ownership across story, storyboard, Gen AI workflows, motion graphics, audio, SFX, QA, and stakeholder-ready delivery.

clientsSection.title: Brand motion built for teams people already trust.
